content:
flowchart TD
    A[Fasting 12-16h: glycogen depletion]
    B[Metabolic switch: glucose to fatty acids and ketones]
    C[Beta-hydroxybutyrate signaling: HDAC inhibition]
    D[Low energy charge activates AMPK, suppresses mTORC1]
    E[Autophagy: organelle and protein recycling]
    F[Low postprandial insulin, reduced visceral lipid]
    G[Improved insulin sensitivity and beta-cell response]
    H[Circadian alignment of peripheral metabolic clocks]
    I[Improved glucose tolerance, lipid handling, blood pressure]
    A --> B
    B --> C
    B --> D
    D --> E
    B --> F
    F --> G
    A --> H
    H --> I
    C --> I
    G --> I
